components.value: V, S, F/DF (strip of rune-inscribed parchment)

description.value: This spell functions as summon monster V, save that it can only be used to summon host devils. These noxious flying devils are also known as gaavs and magaavs. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Campaign Setting: Rival Guide. Â© 2011, Paizo Publishing, LLC. Authors: Brian Cortijo, Adam Daigle, Tim Hitchcock, Brandon Hodge, Colin McComb, Jason Nelson, Amber Scott, Neil Spicer, and Todd Stewart.
